name: 1. Quick Catch-up - survival Spanish - A2
description: Beginner and travel survival practice for urgent real-life situations.

name: 2. Starter conversation prototype - A1/A2
description: The original small prototype set for basic conversational answers.

name: Nanny 1 - A2 - 100 exercises
description: Personal conversation practice for emotions, family, parenting, memories, stress, depression, hopes, regrets, and past-tense core verbs.

name: Random conjugation switching - A2/B1
description: High-quality drill for jumping quickly between verb conjugations and object pronouns without reciting tables.

name: Reflexive switchboard - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Switchboard pill translation for reflexive verbs, reflexive pronouns, and se me / se te / se le constructions.

name: Uses of "I was" - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Switchboard pill translation for choosing between fui, era, estuve, and estaba in single-tense I-was sentences.

name: Anchors - ser (preterite) - fui - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Anchor drills for ser in the preterite: fui, fuiste, fue, fuimos, fuisteis, fueron across I was, you were, she was, we were, you all were, and they were.

name: Anchors - ser (imperfect) - era - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Anchor drills for ser in the imperfect: era, eras, era, éramos, erais, eran across I was, you were, she was, we were, you all were, and they were.

name: Anchors - estar (preterite) - estuve - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Anchor drills for estar in the preterite: estuve, estuviste, estuvo, estuvimos, estuvisteis, estuvieron across I was, you were, she was, we were, you all were, and they were.

name: Anchors - estar (imperfect) - estaba - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Anchor drills for estar in the imperfect: estaba, estabas, estaba, estábamos, estabais, estaban across I was, you were, she was, we were, you all were, and they were.

name: Anchors - ser (preterite + imperfect) - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Combined ser anchor drills switching between preterite and imperfect across all persons: fui/fuiste/fue/fuimos/fuisteis/fueron and era/eras/era/éramos/erais/eran.

name: Anchors - estar (preterite + imperfect) - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Combined estar anchor drills switching between preterite and imperfect across all persons: estuve/estuviste/estuvo/estuvimos/estuvisteis/estuvieron and estaba/estabas/estaba/estábamos/estabais/estaban.

name: Anchors - preterite (ser + estar) - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Combined preterite anchor drills switching between ser and estar across all persons: fui/fuiste/fue/fuimos/fuisteis/fueron and estuve/estuviste/estuvo/estuvimos/estuvisteis/estuvieron.

name: Anchors - imperfect (ser + estar) - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Combined imperfect anchor drills switching between ser and estar across all persons: era/eras/era/éramos/erais/eran and estaba/estabas/estaba/estábamos/estabais/estaban.
